name: Shrimp Scampi with Spinach Noodles
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Milk or half and half
1 pound Shrimp, peeled, deveined, tails removed (28-30)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cream sauce: In a small saucepan, heat 3 tablespoons butter over medium heat. Stir in 3 tablespoons flour and cook for 2 minutes. Gradually whisk in salt, milk or half and half, and white pepper until the mixture is smooth and thickened. Set aside.
2. Cook the shrimp scampi: In a large skillet, melt 3 tablespoons butter over medium heat. Add shallots and garlic and sauté for about 30 seconds. Add shrimp and cook until pink, about 3-5 minutes. Remove shrimp from the skillet and set aside.
3. Deglaze the pan with white wine, oregano, chives, salt, and pepper. Cook until the wine has reduced by half. Return the shrimp to the sauce and stir well.
4. Combine the cream sauce and shrimp mixture in the skillet.
5. Cook the spinach noodles according to package directions. Drain and divide the noodles among plates. Top with the shrimp scampi.
Serves 4.
